metadata.title: Portfolio | Full Stack Developer
metadata.description: Passionate Full Stack Developer. React, Next.js, Vue, Node.js, Laravel, Express, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker.

hero.description: I design and develop high-performance, elegant web applications, from front-end to back-end. Passionate about modern architectures and outstanding user experiences.

projects.title: My Projects
projects.description: A selection of projects that showcase my expertise in full stack development, from concept to production.

1.title: Boucherie Chayma
1.description: Premium halal meat e-commerce with Chronofresh cold-chain delivery.
1.longDescription: Full-featured e-commerce platform for a premium halal butcher shop: product catalog with filters, cart by weight with per-kilo pricing, Stripe payments, simulated Chronofresh delivery, customer area with order tracking and saved addresses, admin dashboard with analytics, product/order management and promo codes. Internationalized in FR/ES/EN.

2.title: Bensow Auto
2.description: Car dealership website with dynamic catalog and admin dashboard.
2.longDescription: Showcase website and vehicle catalog for a car dealership. Dynamic catalog powered by Supabase with filters (brand, fuel, gearbox), detailed vehicle pages with photo gallery. Consignment and custom order forms with client-side image compression before upload. Full admin dashboard: vehicle CRUD, request management, PDF export, Google OAuth authentication, activity logs.

3.title: Maison Claire Conciergerie
3.description: Luxury concierge service with VTC booking and online payment.
3.longDescription: Premium showcase website for a luxury chauffeur, concierge and close protection service. 5-step booking wizard with vehicle selection, dynamic pricing engine (night/weekend/holiday surcharges), Stripe payment. Laravel backend API for admin management (bookings, vehicles, invoices). Automatic day/night theme based on geolocation (SunCalc). Bilingual FR/EN.

4.title: NOIR E-Commerce
4.description: Dark luxury e-commerce platform with GraphQL API (work in progress).
4.longDescription: Full-stack e-commerce with a dark luxury minimalist design. Product catalog, shopping cart, review system, JWT + Google OAuth authentication. Code-first GraphQL API with NestJS, Prisma and PostgreSQL. Admin dashboard with KPIs, product/category/order management. Stripe payment integration. Project under active development.

5.title: Colors Paint
5.description: Auto body shop website with quote form and photo uploads.
5.longDescription: Professional website for an auto body repair shop in Les Ulis, France. Animated landing page with parallax, services grid, animated counters and Google Maps. Multi-step quote form with photo uploads to Cloudflare R2 (presigned URLs), transactional emails via Brevo (garage notification + client confirmation). Full SEO with JSON-LD, sitemap and Open Graph.

6.title: Ouvertures Pro
6.description: Window installation company website with scroll animations and quote form.
6.longDescription: Marketing website for a joinery company in Ile-de-France. Full-screen hero with parallax, 6-service grid with scroll-triggered animations, testimonials, team section and animated counters (IntersectionObserver). Multi-step quote form with personal info, address, project type and desired services. Google Maps integration and floating WhatsApp button.

7.title: Dawn Martins
7.description: Fashion designer portfolio with Payload headless CMS.
7.longDescription: Portfolio website for a young Parisian fashion designer studying at Lisaa Mode Paris. Photo galleries with lightbox and justified grid, fashion collections (Meteore, Reminescence, Placidite, Contraste), biography and press pages. Payload CMS v3 headless backend with PostgreSQL for content management, responsive media and CV download. Frontend deployed on Netlify, Dockerized CMS.

8.title: Secure Ops
8.description: Tactical command center for security companies with RBAC.
8.longDescription: Multi-role dashboard (manager, agent, client) for security operations management. Complete RBAC system with Next.js middleware and Supabase Auth, multi-tenant database schema (tenants, sites, posts, shifts, incidents, logs). Realtime providers for flash alerts and typed notifications. Jest unit tests. Project under active development.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: A range of mastered technologies, from front to back, including databases and DevOps.
